name: Ragnar the Unstoppable
description: A fierce warrior who knows only one strategy: ATTACK. Gets stronger as he gets angrier.
lore: Ragnar lost everything in the Great War. Now he fights for the thrill, the blood, the roar of victory.

name: Ironwall the Unyielding
description: An immovable object. Absorbs punishment and retaliates with crushing force.
lore: Guardian of the Northern Gates. Has never retreated from battle. His shield bears a thousand scars.

name: Loki the Wildcard
description: Unpredictable and chaotic. High luck means crits happen often. You never know what he'll do next.
lore: A trickster god in mortal form. Fights for fun, not glory. Cheats when he can. Wins when he shouldn't.

name: Athena the Tactician
description: Every move calculated. Adapts to opponent's weaknesses. Rarely makes mistakes.
lore: Former war general. Won 47 battles without losing a single soldier. Now fights to test her theories.

name: Nova the Annihilator
description: Hits like a meteor. Dies like glass. Win fast or don't win at all.
lore: Channeler of raw cosmic energy. Can't control her power. Each attack risks burning her from the inside.

name: Kai the Balanced
description: Master of all, specialist in none. Adapts to any opponent with balanced stats.
lore: Trained in every fighting style. Believes perfection comes from balance, not extremes.

name: Zephyr the Swift
description: Can't catch what you can't see. Strikes before you blink. High speed ensures first strike.
lore: Wind spirit bound to mortal form. Moves faster than thought. Dances through combat like it's a game.

name: Titan the Colossus
description: An absolute unit. Slow but unkillable. Outlasts everyone. Wins by attrition.
lore: Ancient golem awakened by war. Made of living stone. Feels no pain. Stops for nothing.
